response_raw:

"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be cautious when consuming information online. Here are some tips to help you identify and avoid fake content: 1) Check the source of the information, 2) Verify the credentials of the author or creator, 3) Look for evidence that supports the claims made in the content, 4) Be skeptical of content that seems too good (or bad) to be true, and 5) Use fact-checking websites or tools to verify the accuracy of information. Additionally, it is important to be mindful of your own social media presence and avoid posting content that could be perceived as fake or misleading. By being aware of these tips and practicing them consistently, you can help create a safer and more trustworthy online environment for yourself and others."

response_parsed.opinion: To deal with fake content on social media, it is important to be cautious when consuming information online. Here are some tips to help you identify and avoid fake content: 1) Check the source of the information, 2) Verify the credentials of the author or creator, 3) Look for evidence that supports the claims made in the content, 4) Be skeptical of content that seems too good (or bad) to be true, and 5) Use fact-checking websites or tools to verify the accuracy of information. Additionally, it is important to be mindful of your own social media presence and avoid posting content that could be perceived as fake or misleading. By being aware of these tips and practicing them consistently, you can help create a safer and more trustworthy online environment for yourself and others.
